raw_consumer_statement:
Reason for the complaint : Citibank denied my fraud dispute despite clear proof that I did not authorize the charges. I am requesting CFPB intervention under Regulation Z. 

Description : Between XX/XX/XXXX and XX/XX/year>, {$2300.00} in fraudulent transactions were made in XXXX on my Citibank credit card. Citibank notified me of the fraud alert on XX/XX/XXXX, and I immediately canceled the card. The bank issued a provisional credit but reversed it on XX/XX/year>, stating the dispute did not pass. 

I provided clear evidence that I was not in XXXX during the fraudulent period. I re-entered the XXXX XXXX  on XX/XX/XXXX and remained in XXXX XXXX, where I made multiple legitimate purchases with this and other Citibank cards. It was impossible for me to make the transactions in XXXX. 

Citibank has not provided : - The reason code - Any merchant evidence - A clear explanation for denying the dispute Under Regulation Z ( 12 CFR 1026.13 ), Citibank is required to reimburse unauthorized charges and conduct a reasonable investigation.
